## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Davis Schneider's Drip and Marcel Santilli's GrowthX.ai, discussing their respective AI-driven content platforms and business models.](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Davis is developing Drip, an AI-powered content curation platform that aggregates relevant professional content across various platforms](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Marcel's GrowthX.ai offers AI-driven content creation and publishing services for brands, with $7M ARR and recent $12M Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Both see potential synergies in data sharing, API integration, and possibly co-marketing or revenue-generating partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Marcel expressed openness to exploring collaboration, including potential customer relationship or pilot program with Drip](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)

## Topics

### Drip: Davis's AI-Powered Content Curation Platform

  - [Aggregates content from various platforms (LinkedIn, podcasts, Substack, Medium, YouTube, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Uses AI to serve personalized, relevant content based on professional interests](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Davis self-taught Python, built data foundation with AI assistance (GPT-4)](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Recently secured seed funding from Antler accelerator](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Preparing to launch MVP and iterate towards product-market fit](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### GrowthX.ai: Marcel's AI-Driven Content Creation Service

  - [Offers "service as software" for brands' content needs](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows and human review to create, edit, and publish content](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Grew from $1M to $7M ARR in \~6 months](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Raised $12M Series A, now 50 employees](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Utilizes various APIs (e.g., Perplexity, SERP) and custom AI agents for research and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)

### Potential Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Data sharing: Drip's curated content could feed into GrowthX.ai's workflows](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [API integration: GrowthX.ai open to ingesting data from new sources like Drip](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Co-marketing or revenue-sharing possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Pilot program: GrowthX.ai could become an early Drip customer](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)

### Industry Insights

  - [Both see high demand for AI-powered content solutions](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Challenge of information overload and fragmented content landscape](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Trend towards outsourcing content creation and curation to AI-assisted services](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Davis to reach out in a few weeks after onboarding tech team members](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)
  - [Explore potential for data sharing or API integration between Drip and GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Consider signing NDA for more detailed discussions on collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [Marcel offered to share fundraising insights if Davis pursues future rounds](https://fathom.video/share/cJUN5meBwzhztypSWUhcMQCTQc48fj4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
